age_range.evidence: We collected objective digital trace Instagram use data and subjective self-report use data to investigate relations with self-reported self-esteem, loneliness, body satisfaction, and depression among 192 young adults (ages 18–25).

gender_split.evidence: We recruited 145 female participants (75.52 %), 45 male participants (23.44 %), and 2 participants who did not wish to disclose (1.04 %).

fieldwork_year.evidence: We collected data online during the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic in March 2020.

countries.evidence: We only included the data from these 192 participants (i.e., 35 recruited on MTurk, and 157 recruited from introductory psychology and communication courses in a large public university in the U.S.)
